response.justification: Strong technical engineer with 20 years of experience and excellent software craftsmanship, but lacks the demonstrated AI expertise this director-level strategy role requires. Current engagement with AI-agent infrastructure is recent and represents tooling/infrastructure work rather than established expertise in AI product strategy, deep ML knowledge, or the advanced degree the role prefers. The resume shows individual contributor excellence but not the recognized AI thought leadership or strategic positioning needed for an AI Strategy principal engineer.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) exceeds the 15-year requirement
Strong emphasis on software craftsmanship, testing, and code quality with demonstrated leadership in community education (workshops, talks)
Current Staff-level role at re:cinq with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows engagement with emerging AI platform technologies
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field and no evidence of formal advanced study in AI—a stated preferred qualification for this AI Strategy role
No demonstrated products or platforms built with AI; current AI involvement is recent infrastructure/tooling work, not strategic product development
No visible evidence of recognized thought leadership in AI/ML, strategic advisory work with customers on AI adoption, or publications that would establish director-level AI expertise

key_factors.factor: Strategic positioning vs. individual contributor focus
